CustomField.description: Salesforce-format cron expression that defines when this job runs. Uses the 7-field Salesforce cron syntax: Seconds Minutes Hours Day_of_month Month Day_of_week Optional_year.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Salesforce cron expression defining the schedule (e.g., 0 0 12 * * ? for daily at noon). See Salesforce Apex Scheduler documentation for syntax.
CustomField.label: Cron Expression
